case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL CORP. VS. APALINARIO DIAZ et al

docket_entries.description: EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER /DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND ISSUANCE OF WRIT OF POSSESSION FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL CORP.
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL CORP. ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT DIAZ, APALINARIO DIAZ, MARIA

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL CORP. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DIAZ, APALINARIO DIAZ, MARIA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1450 DIVISADERO STREET, #106, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $640.00 RENT, $787.00 ATTORNEY FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,427.00, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOC
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT DIAZ, APALINARIO DIAZ, MARIA
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT DIAZ, APALINARIO DIAZ, MARIA
